scripts.dev: concurrently "elm-watch hot" "pnpm exec esbuild lib/elm-codemirror/js/codemirror-bundle.js --bundle --outfile=build/codemirror-bundle.js --format=iife --preserve-symlinks --watch" "pnpm exec esbuild ws-bridge.js --bundle --outfile=build/ws-bridge.js --format=iife --preserve-symlinks --watch" "node dev-server.js" "sh scripts/open-if-not-open.sh http://localhost:8015"
scripts.build: npm run build:cm6 -- --minify && npm run build:ws -- --minify && elm-watch make --optimize
scripts.buildnonoptimized: npm run build:cm6 && npm run build:ws && elm-watch make
scripts.bench: node benchmarks/gen-fixture.js && cd benchmarks && elm make src/Main.elm --output=build/benchmark.js && node serve.js
